title: write me a construction contract between a general contractor and prospective client

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: write me a construction contract between a general contractor and prospective client

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Construction Agreement

This Construction Agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into as of _______ (the "Effective Date") by and between:

__________ (the "Owner"), located at ________________,
and
__________ (the "Contractor"), located at ________________.

Collectively referred to as the "Parties".

WHEREAS, the Owner desires to construct, install, or improve certain facilities, structures, and appurtenances upon the Owner's property located at ________(the "Property") described in Exhibit A;

AND WHEREAS, the Contractor has the necessary experience, knowledge, skills, and abilities to perform the construction work and services required for the Owner's desired project;

NOW, THEREFORE, in consideration of the mutual covenants and promises set forth herein, and for other good and valuable consideration, the receipt and sufficiency of which are hereby acknowledged, the Parties agree as follows:

1. Scope of Work
The Contractor shall perform, furnish, and complete all construction work and services described in the Work Authorization attached hereto as Exhibit B (the "Work") in accordance with the Scope of Work attached hereto as Exhibit C (the "Scope of Work").

2. Time of Completion
The Contractor shall commence the Work within ____ days after the Effective Date hereof and shall achieve substantial completion of the Work within ________ days from the Effective Date, subject to any adjustments to the completion schedule approved by the Parties in writing.

3. Contract Price and Payment

a) The Owner agrees to pay the Contractor, as total compensation for the full and satisfactory performance of the Work, the sum of ________ (the "Contract Price") in accordance with the Payment Schedule attached hereto as Exhibit D.
b) All payments shall be made in accordance with the Payment Schedule and are subject to the Owner's final approval and acceptance of the Work.
c) The Owner shall make progress payments to the Contractor for work satisfactorily completed in accordance with the Payment Schedule. The Owner may withhold any payment if, in the Owner's reasonable opinion, the Work is not proceeding according to the Schedule or if any condition of this Agreement has not been met.
d) The Owner may require the Contractor to submit satisfactory evidence that all labor, materials, and equipment invoices have been paid to date before making any payment.

4. Changes in the Work

a) The Owner may, without invalidating the Agreement and without notice to any surety, require changes, additions, or deletions from the Scope of Work (hereinafter, a "Change Order"). All Change Orders shall be in writing and shall be accompanied by an adjustment to the Contract Price and/or Schedule.
b) No extra cost or extension of time shall be allowed to the Contractor for any Change Order unless such extra cost or extension of time has been agreed upon in writing by the Parties prior to the execution of the Change Order.

5. Supervision and Subcontractors

a) The Contractor shall provide competent supervision of the Work and shall be solely responsible for managing all subcontractors, suppliers, and trades required for the performance of the Work.
b) All subcontractors, suppliers, and trades shall be bound by the terms and conditions of this Agreement, and the Contractor shall require each subcontractor, supplier, and trade to provide insurance coverage and other documentation as may be reasonably required by the Owner.

6. Insurance and Bonds

a) The Contractor shall maintain insurance coverage satisfying the requirements set forth in Exhibit E (the "Insurance Requirements"). The Contractor shall provide certificates of insurance to the Owner upon request.
b) The Owner may require the Contractor to furnish performance and payment bonds, in a form and issued by a surety company acceptable to the Owner, covering the faithful performance of this Agreement and the payment of all obligations arising thereunder.

7. Warranties

a) The Contractor warrants to the Owner that all materials, equipment, and labor furnished by the Contractor shall be of good quality and free from defects in workmanship and materials for a period of one (1) year from the date of substantial completion.
b) This warranty does not cover damage caused by misuse, abuse, accident, neglect, normal wear and tear, or acts of God.

8. Indemnification

The Contractor shall indemnify, defend, and hold the Owner and its agents, employees, and representatives harmless from and against any and all liabilities, losses, damages, claims, penalties, fines, costs, and expenses (including attorneys' fees) arising from or relating to the performance or non-performance of the Work or this Agreement.

9. Termination

a) Either Party may terminate this Agreement upon written notice to the other Party if the other Party materially breaches any of its representations, warranties, covenants, or obligations under this Agreement and fails to cure such breach within thirty (30) days after receiving notice thereof.
b) Upon termination, the Contractor shall be entitled to compensation for work satisfactorily completed to the date of termination. The Contractor shall provide the Owner with a final invoice reflecting the work completed to the date of termination, and the Owner shall pay the Contractor all undisputed amounts thereon.

10. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution

This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of _______ without regard to any principles of conflicts of law. Any disputes arising from this Agreement shall be resolved by binding arbitration in accordance with the rules of the American Arbitration Association then in effect. Judgment upon the award rendered by the arbitrator(s) may be entered in any court having jurisdiction thereof.

11. Miscellaneous

a) This Agreement, together with all Exhibits hereto, constitutes the entire agreement between the Parties and supersedes all prior negotiations, representations, warranties, promises, or agreements, whether written or oral, with respect to the subject matter hereof.
b) This Agreement may be amended or modified only by a written instrument executed by both Parties.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the Parties have executed this Agreement as of the Effective Date set forth above.

OWNER:
__________________________________________
[Owner's Name]
[Title, if applicable]

CONTRACTOR:
__________________________________________
[Contractor's Name]
[Title, if applicable]

EXHIBIT A – Legal Description of Property
[Insert legal description of property]

EXHIBIT B – Work Authorization
[Insert details of the specific work to be performed]

EXHIBIT C – Scope of Work
[Insert details of the scope of work, including plans, specifications, and other requirements]

EXHIBIT D – Payment Schedule
[Insert schedule of payment amounts and corresponding milestones or dates]

EXHIBIT E – Insurance Requirements
[Insert details of insurance coverage required for the Contractor and subcontractors, including types of insurance, policy limits, deductibles, and any other relevant requirements.]

a) The Contractor warrants to the Owner that all materials, equipment, and labor furnished by the Contractor shall be of good quality and free from defects in workmanship and materials for a period of one (1) year from the date of substantial completion.

The Contractor shall indemnify, defend, and hold the Owner and its agents, employees, and representatives harmless from and against any and all liabilities, losses, damages, claims, penalties, fines, costs, and expenses (including attorneys' fees) arising from or relating to the performance or non-performance of the Work or this Agreement.

9. Termination

a) Either Party may terminate this Agreement upon written notice to the other Party if the other Party materially breaches any of its representations, warranties, covenants, or obligations under this Agreement and fails to cure such breach within thirty (30) days after receiving notice thereof.

The Contractor shall provide the Owner with a final invoice reflecting the work completed to the date of termination, and the Owner shall pay the Contractor all undisputed amounts thereon.

10. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution

This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of _______ without regard to any principles of conflicts of law. Any disputes arising from this Agreement shall be resolved by binding arbitration in accordance with the rules of the American Arbitration Association then in effect. Judgment upon the award rendered by the arbitrator(s) may be entered in any court having jurisdiction thereof.

11. Miscellaneous

a) This Agreement, together with all Exhibits hereto, constitutes the entire agreement between the Parties and supersedes all prior negotiations, representations, warranties, promises, or agreements, whether written or oral, with respect to the subject matter hereof.
b) This Agreement may be amended or modified only by a written instrument executed by both Parties.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the Parties have executed this Agreement as of the Effective Date set forth above.
